name: sc-e-prescription-deploy
description: Isolated, minimal toolchain that deploys the three registries to Besu. Has its OWN committed package-lock.json so the server runs `npm ci` (deterministic, no peer-dep resolution) instead of resolving the heavy app dependency tree.

scripts.deploy: hardhat --config hardhat.config.cjs ignition deploy ignition/modules/Deploy.cjs --network besu --parameters ignition/params.json
